use_types.hero: Finished showcase — hero page or portfolio

subtypes.together: Before + after in single frame (split view)

images.caption: This modern bathroom features green tiled walls and a walk-in shower enclosed by glass. The wooden vanity adds warmth to the contemporary design.

A spacious bathroom featuring a white tub, a wooden vanity, and a green plant by the window, with various toiletries organized on the floor. The neutral tiles and natural lighting create a bright and open atmosphere.

Two workers are in the process of installing a dark wood vanity in a bright bathroom, with ample natural light coming through the windows. The workspace is tidy, with tools and protective covers visible on the floor.
This photo shows a corner of a room with exposed block walls and a couple of cleaning tools leaned against it. A ceiling light illuminates the space, highlighting the unfinished look of the area.
The left side shows an outdated bathroom with a tub and basic fixtures, while the right side reveals a modern renovation featuring elegant marble walls, a sleek shower, and a stylish vanity.

The left side features an outdated bathroom with a jetted tub and blue wallpaper, while the right side showcases a modern bathroom with marble walls and a walk-in shower, highlighting a significant upgrade in style and materials.

This image features a side-by-side comparison of a bathroom: the left side shows an older design with a beige bathtub and white tiles, while the right side showcases a modern aesthetic with clean white tiles, a sleek vanity, and an updated shower area.
Left side shows an old blue tiled shower with a curtain and various toiletries, while the right side features a modern white marble tile shower with a sleek design and a tub.

This image showcases a bathroom transformation, featuring a compact shower area on the left with a curtain and a modern, elegant soaking tub alongside a spacious walk-in shower with marble tiles on the right.
The photo showcases a side-by-side comparison of a dated bathroom featuring a floral curtain and beige tiles versus a sleek, modern bathroom with a glass-enclosed shower and contemporary fixtures.
The left side features a dated bathroom with dark green storage and purple accents, while the right showcases a modern, sleek design with a walk-in shower and minimalist white cabinetry.
The left side shows a dated bathroom with tan tiles and a large tub, while the right side features a modern makeover with sleek marble flooring, a glass shower, and a freestanding bathtub.

The left side showcases an outdated bathroom with floral wallpaper and old tiles, while the right side presents a modern renovation featuring a luxurious bathtub, elegant fixtures, and neutral-toned walls.

The photo presents a side-by-side comparison of a dated bathroom on the left with beige cabinetry and carpet, contrasted with a modernized bathroom on the right featuring sleek white tiles, a glass shower, and contemporary fixtures.

The left side features an outdated bathroom with a beige tub and dark wood vanity, while the right showcases a modern bathroom renovation with a walk-in shower, white cabinetry, and elegant marble tiles.

The photo displays a bathroom with a left side featuring a tub and tiled shower area with a decorative pattern, while the right side showcases a modern shower with sleek fixtures and a glass enclosure.

A side-by-side comparison showcases a bathroom transformation, with the left featuring dated glass block walls and brown tones, while the right displays a modern, sleek design with a walk-in shower and stylish tile work.
This modern walk-in shower features sleek green marble walls and a glass enclosure, accompanied by a stylish bathroom vanity and a bright, spacious layout.

The photo showcases a bathroom transformation with a split view: on the left, a dated space featuring glass block walls and light-colored tiles, while the right displays a modern design with a stylish shower area, dark flooring, and a contemporary toilet.

This photo showcases a renovated bathroom with a modern dual vanity featuring a wide sink area, contrasted with a more traditional look on the left side, highlighting the transformation from older design to a sleek, contemporary finish.
The upper space features a modern kitchen with dark cabinetry and a stylish backsplash, while the lower area displays an older dining setup with mismatched furniture and neutral walls.

The image showcases a bathroom renovation with a contrasting before-and-after view. The upper half displays an old space with dark green walls and clutter, while the lower half reveals a modern design featuring light tiles, a glass shower, and updated cabinetry.
A bathroom renovation showcasing a transformation from a glass block shower enclosure to a sleek, modern walk-in shower with stone tiles and elegant fixtures.
The left side showcases a traditional bathroom with a glass shower and a bathtub, while the right side features a modern design with large-format porcelain tiles and a freestanding tub.

The photo displays a side-by-side comparison of a kitchen renovation: the left side features warm wood cabinetry and outdated appliances, while the right showcases modern dark cabinetry and sleek white countertops.
This modern bathroom features a sleek white vanity with black fixtures, a spacious walk-in shower with glass doors, and neutral tile flooring, creating a fresh and contemporary atmosphere.
A side-by-side comparison of a modern bathroom renovation, showcasing a sleek, open shower with mosaic tiles next to a more traditional bathroom setup featuring a closed toilet and wall decorations.

This photo showcases a side-by-side comparison of a bathroom renovation, featuring a dated beige and brown space on the left and a sleek, modern bathroom with a glass shower and light cabinetry on the right.
The left side features a traditional tub with a decorative curtain and beige tiles, while the right side presents a modern walk-in shower with grey tiles and a glass enclosure.
This photo showcases a transition from a simple doorway and entry area to a luxurious marble bathroom featuring an elegant tub and modern fixtures.
The photo showcases a side-by-side comparison of a bathroom renovation, featuring a modern design with a marble floor on the right and a previously darker, more cluttered space on the left.

The image showcases a transformation from an older shower with tiled walls and a basic setup to a modern walk-in shower featuring sleek gray tiles and a stylish rain showerhead, illustrating the clear upgrade in design and functionality.

This image shows a side-by-side comparison of two bathrooms; on the left, a dated purple-walled space with a simple vanity, and on the right, a contemporary design featuring wooden cabinetry and patterned flooring.

The photo showcases a before-and-after comparison of a bathroom renovation, featuring a dated space with a beige bathtub and dark purple walls on the left, contrasted with a modern design featuring white tiles, a sleek tub, and wooden cabinetry on the right.
The image showcases a transformation from a glass block shower to a more contemporary bath area featuring a walk-in shower and soaking tub with modern fixtures.

This image showcases a bathroom transformation featuring an old tub and shower setup on the left, contrasted with a modern walk-in shower on the right, highlighting sleek tiles and contemporary fixtures.

This image showcases a beautifully renovated bathroom, contrasting a modern tub and shower area with elegant tile work above an older, more traditional design featuring smaller tiles and a more basic tub setup.
This bathroom features vibrant floral wallpaper with warm tones and a modern wooden vanity. The space is well-lit, showcasing a clean and stylish design.
The photo showcases a before-and-after comparison of a bathroom renovation, featuring an outdated shower with a frosted glass door next to a modern, spacious walk-in shower with sleek tiles.

The left side showcases an outdated bathroom with a glass shower and beige walls, while the right displays a modern walk-in shower with sleek tiles and a large window, reflecting a significant upgrade in design.
The photo showcases a bathroom renovation, featuring a vintage pink vanity area with grey cabinets on one side, and a modern shower space with patterned tiles and a sleek design on the other.
This image showcases a bathroom transformation from a dated pink design with old fixtures to a sleek modern style featuring neutral tiles, a new vanity, and a walk-in shower.

The left side shows an older bathroom with a simple design and storage space, while the right side presents a modernized area featuring a sleek vanity with a well-lit mirror and contemporary finishes.
The left side showcases a dated bathroom with divided areas and dark tile, while the right side reveals a modern, airy design featuring large-format porcelain tiles and a sleek vanity.

This image shows a bathroom transformation from an enclosed shower with gold accents to a modern, frameless glass shower with a luxury bathtub. The new design features sleek tiles and ample natural light.

This photo showcases a bathroom transformation featuring a modern freestanding tub, elegant wood cabinetry, and contrasting tile work, illustrating the transition from a dated design to a contemporary aesthetic.
The left side shows an old bathroom with a dated tub and pull-down showerhead, while the right side features a modern walk-in shower with stylish tiles and sleek fixtures.

The left side shows an older bathroom with blue tiled walls and cluttered countertops, while the right showcases a modern renovated bathroom with a sleek walk-in shower and a clean, minimalist vanity.

The photo shows a transformation from a traditional shower with beige tiles to a modern walk-in shower featuring large-format porcelain tiles and sleek black fixtures.

The photo showcases a bathroom renovation with a dark wood vanity and bright lighting on the left, transitioning to a modern light blue vanity with large mirrors on the right, highlighting the upgrade in style and functionality.

The photo shows a side-by-side comparison of a bathroom before and after renovation. The left side features an outdated design with a traditional tub and shower, while the right side showcases a modern, sleek space with a freestanding tub and an elegant shower setup.

A comparison of two bathrooms: the left shows an older design with a round vanity and beige walls, while the right features a modern renovation with sleek cabinetry and a walk-in shower clad in textured tiles.
This photo showcases a contemporary bathroom with a dual vanity area featuring a modern sink and a stylish black pedestal sink against a vibrant orange wall and mosaic details.

This modern bathroom features a sleek walk-in shower with glass doors, a stylish vanity with a circular sink, and neutral-toned tiles on both the floor and walls, creating a bright and spacious appearance.

The left side shows an older bathroom with white tiles and a shower curtain, while the right side showcases a modern renovation featuring clean lines, large-format porcelain tiles, and a glass shower enclosure.
The left side displays a dated bathroom with patterned wallpaper and a traditional toilet, while the right side features a modern renovation with a stone wall, sleek vanity, and contemporary toilet.

The left side shows an older bathroom with cracked tiles and a shower-tub combo, while the right side features a modern bathroom with large white tiles, a sleek shower enclosure, and a stylish vanity.
The before side features a standard vanity and a small shower area, while the after side showcases a modern bathroom with a spacious walk-in shower and stylish cabinetry.

This photo shows a comparison of two bathroom designs: the left features dark walls with a grid-pattern shower curtain and classic vanity, while the right showcases a modern aesthetic with white tile, an open shower, and sleek fixtures.
The left side shows an outdated bathroom with a tiled tub and wooden cabinet, while the right side features a sleek, modern bathroom with a glass shower and contemporary vanity.

The photo compares an outdated bathroom with a small shower and toilet to a modern renovation featuring a spacious walk-in shower and a freestanding tub, showcasing elegant marble tiles and contemporary lighting.

This photo showcases a bathroom transformation: the left side features outdated tiles and a conventional layout, while the right side reveals a modern design with a freestanding tub and sleek fixtures.

The before photo features outdated brown tiles and a vintage pink sink, while the after photo showcases a modern bathroom with a white vanity, elegant light fixtures, and a clean aesthetic.

A modern bathroom featuring large-format porcelain tiles, a walk-in shower with clear glass panels, and a sleek vanity. The design combines neutral tones with a vibrant green towel for a refreshing look.

This modern bathroom features a sleek, freestanding tub alongside a stylish vessel sink, accented by grey stone countertops and warm wood cabinetry. The walk-in shower showcases textured tiles, creating an inviting and luxurious space.
The bathroom features a modern design with a freestanding tub, gray cabinetry, and elegant light fixtures, accentuated by a stylish walk-in shower area with sleek tiles.
This modern bathroom features a sleek design with a wooden vanity, large mirrors, and elegant marble walls. The walk-in shower showcases a minimalist aesthetic with a calming color palette.
A modern bathroom sink area featuring a minimalist design with marble backsplash, sleek faucet, and neatly arranged towels on a wooden tray.

This modern bathroom features a stylish floating vanity with a round mirror, complemented by a mix of wood and white finishes. The space is well-lit and organized, showcasing a plant and neatly arranged shelf items.
This modern bathroom features a large freestanding tub and a walk-in shower with sleek gray tiles, complemented by ample natural light from the nearby window and skylight.
The modern bathroom features a spacious walk-in shower with glass panels, a sleek toilet, and a wooden vanity, showcasing a clean and contemporary design with soft lighting.
This modern bathroom features a sleek walk-in shower with glass walls, a freestanding tub, and elegant marble tile accents, creating a luxurious and spacious feel.
This bathroom features a vintage-style freestanding tub on a checkerboard tile floor, complemented by a vibrant yellow wall and rustic brick accents, creating a warm and inviting space.

A modern living room featuring a gray accent wall, stylish furniture, and a cozy atmosphere. The space includes a comfortable sofa, a coffee table, and large windows with sheer curtains allowing natural light.

This beautifully renovated bathroom features white subway tiles, a sleek marble countertop, and a modern bathtub with an elegant shower fixture. Natural light streams through a window, enhancing the clean and contemporary aesthetic.

The image features detailed chrome faucets labeled 'Hot' and 'Cold' alongside various plumbing components and a blueprint, highlighting the components for a bathroom renovation project.
A contractor is drilling into a wooden edge as part of a bathroom renovation. The background features unfinished walls and construction materials, indicating an ongoing project.
Two workers are installing large format tiles in a bathroom, with a tile cutter and various tools visible. The walls feature a marble-like design, and the space is in the midst of renovation.

A person wearing yellow gloves applies caulk around a bathtub faucet and showerhead in a contemporary bathroom. The clean, white tiles complement the chrome fixtures, indicating active home improvement work.

A woman is actively using a power tool to work on the floor of a bathroom, while another person holds a wooden pole nearby. The bathroom is in the midst of renovation, with a visible wall that appears to be under construction.
A worker is installing plumbing under a modern bathtub in a well-lit bathroom, featuring neutral-toned tiles and a clean aesthetic.
A paintbrush rests in a gray bucket, set against a smooth, muted gray wall. The composition highlights the tools of the painting process, suggesting an ongoing home improvement project.
A collection of plumbing tools and parts is scattered on a tiled bathroom floor, with a toilet visible in the background, indicating an ongoing renovation process.
A person is applying a fresh coat of white paint to the inside of a bathtub using a small roller, while the tub has a clean and pristine look with light reflections in the water.

A modern bathroom featuring a freestanding tub, a spacious walk-in shower with clear glass walls, and elegant tile work on the floor. The space is well-lit with natural light and includes contemporary fixtures.
The bathroom features vintage floral wallpaper with a copper sink and wooden vanity, complemented by modern lighting and a decorative archway that adds elegance to the space.

This modern bathroom features a freestanding white tub, a chic dual sink vanity, and stone walls that create a serene atmosphere. The warm wood accents in the cabinetry and door complement the sleek, minimalist design.
This spacious bathroom features a freestanding white tub surrounded by elegant marble walls and a glass shower enclosure, creating a luxurious and modern atmosphere.

This modern bathroom features a sleek design with a wooden vanity, white cabinetry, and large windows allowing natural light. The space exhibits a mix of minimalist aesthetics with its clean lines and warm wood tones.

This bright bathroom features a wooden vanity with double sinks, marble flooring, and a soothing green wainscoting. Natural light from the window enhances the fresh and clean aesthetic.

This luxurious bathroom features a large double vanity with elegant white cabinetry, complemented by marble countertops and a stunning freestanding tub. The spacious layout is enhanced by natural light from the window and tasteful lighting fixtures.

This modern bathroom features a sleek tub and shower combination with gold fixtures, complemented by a wooden vanity and stylish wall decor. The clean lines and neutral tones create a sophisticated and inviting atmosphere.
This modern bathroom features a sleek white vanity with black accents, a glass-enclosed shower, and decorative hexagonal tiles combined with intricate black and white patterned flooring.
This modern bathroom features elegant marble walls, dual circular mirrors with gold frames, and a stylish white vanity, complemented by a sleek black hexagonal tile floor.

The photo showcases a modern bathroom featuring gray cabinetry, a white marble countertop, and decorative flooring with geometric patterns. The space is well-lit and conveys a clean, contemporary aesthetic.

This modern bathroom features a sleek freestanding tub and a spacious walk-in shower with glass doors, all set against a stylish black and white patterned floor. The bright lighting and large window enhance the open and airy feel of the space.

This photo showcases a modern bathroom space featuring white subway tiles combined with patterned floor tiles. The design highlights a walk-in shower area with a minimalist shower fixture and a stylish toilet.

A modern bathroom featuring a walk-in shower with wooden accent walls, a double vanity with marble countertops, round mirrors, and stylish decor elements. The space combines functionality with contemporary design, showcasing a clean and elegant aesthetic.

This modern bathroom features a wooden accent wall, a white double vanity, and a spacious glass shower. The large windows allow natural light to fill the space, highlighting the elegant materials used.

This modern bathroom features a sleek freestanding tub, bronze fixtures, and a striking large-format mural with abstract patterns of blue and gold. The design combines elegance with contemporary materials, highlighted by a spacious layout and natural light.

The photo showcases a transition from light-colored tiled flooring to modern laminate wood flooring, illustrating a comprehensive flooring upgrade in a well-lit residential space.

The photo showcases a beautifully finished wooden porch with rich, warm tones, complemented by elegant double doors and a stone accent wall. The smooth, polished surface of the flooring highlights the craftsmanship of this outdoor space.

This kitchen showcases a stylish design with dark green cabinets and light wood flooring, featuring an inviting dining area with a round table and comfortable chairs. The space is well-lit, highlighting the modern appliances and warm decor elements.

The bathroom features a new beige linoleum floor with a textured pattern, complementing the dark cabinetry and white fixtures. The space is well-lit, showcasing the modern look of the completed renovation.

A stylish living room featuring a light beige sofa, decorative cushions, and a wooden coffee table. The herringbone patterned flooring adds warmth, complemented by large windows dressed with sheer and rich brown curtains.

This modern bathroom features geometric patterned flooring, a green vanity, and an inviting atmosphere with natural light and stylish decor elements.

The spacious living area features polished hardwood floors, a modern grey couch with decorative pillows, and a cozy fireplace surrounded by a brick wall, illuminated by natural light filtering through sheer curtains.

This modern bathroom features a blend of gray and wood tones, including a stylish vanity with dual sinks, a contemporary toilet, and a walk-in shower with wooden accent tiles, creating a sleek and inviting space.
Two HVAC systems side by side, showcasing an old unit marked 'HELL' next to a newer model from 'Goodman'. Both systems are connected to ductwork, with visible water heater in the background.
A comparison of a clogged dryer vent with lint buildup on the left and a clean, functional vent on the right, showcasing the importance of regular maintenance for optimal airflow.
The image shows two contrasting views of a duct space: one with a muddy, uneven surface and eroded walls, and the other featuring a sleek, clean, concrete finish, indicating a significant renovation.
A tangle of colorful wires connects to a metallic HVAC unit, showcasing the cluttered and complex wiring involved in its setup.
A comparison of two drainage pipes: the left shows a buildup of tangled material, while the right is clean and clear, indicating improved drainage.
The image shows a dirty duct interior with dusty brown debris on the left, contrasting with a clean, smooth duct surface on the right, highlighting the importance of regular maintenance.
An HVAC ductwork section shows a combination of clean metal on one side and rough, textured material on the other, illustrating the contrast between new and old conditions.

The photo shows two different air conditioning units positioned outside a house, with one unit appearing older and less modern than the other, highlighting a before-and-after comparison of HVAC systems.

The image showcases two HVAC units positioned in a narrow space, one with an open front revealing internal components and the other appearing fully assembled, illustrating a side-by-side comparison of their configurations.

The image shows a side-by-side comparison of an old air conditioning unit and a new, modern HVAC system. The old unit has a weathered appearance, while the new one is sleek and professionally installed.

The photo showcases two HVAC units side by side: the left unit appears older and less efficient, while the right unit is modern and sleek, indicating an upgrade. The surrounding area is clean and well-maintained.
The left side shows a cluttered and dirty duct space filled with debris, while the right side reveals a clean and empty duct, showcasing the transformation from disarray to tidiness.

The image showcases two HVAC units side by side: an older, weathered model with visible wear in a natural setting versus a newer, modern unit in better condition, highlighting the transition in heating and cooling technology.

This photo showcases a side-by-side comparison of an old HVAC unit on the left and a new, modern unit on the right. The outdated unit is rusty and faded, while the new one has a sleek design and fresh materials.
An outdoor wall mounted air conditioning unit is shown alongside a ladder, while the indoor unit is sleekly installed on a white wall, highlighting a clean and modern HVAC setup.
The image shows a dirty and partially disassembled HVAC unit, highlighting the condenser coils and surrounding components. The overall condition suggests ongoing maintenance or repair work.
The image features a metallic mesh panel with a textural surface, likely used in an HVAC application, displaying a mix of reflective and shadowy areas.
This photo shows an HVAC unit in disrepair with visible dust buildup and a peeling surface around it, indicating a need for maintenance or repair.
A worn, textured HVAC filter sits against a plain background, showing significant dust accumulation and wear, indicating it is in need of replacement.
A well-maintained air conditioning unit is positioned in a corner with vibrant, green and multicolored foliage in the foreground, showing a clean and organized outdoor space.

This image shows an outdoor HVAC unit positioned on a concrete pad next to a wall, with visible electrical and drainage connections in place. The unit is in good condition, and the surrounding area is clear of debris.
A collection of HVAC tools and hoses intricately arranged on the ground near an air conditioning unit, showcasing the setup for maintenance or installation work.

This photo shows the installation process of a new HVAC unit with bundled coolant lines running along the side of the house, secured in protective covering against the wall. The surrounding area appears clean, and the equipment is positioned neatly on a concrete slab.
The image shows a before-and-after comparison of a dryer duct; on the left, it is clogged with lint buildup, while the right displays a clean, smooth duct interior.

The image showcases an HVAC unit before and after: the top half reveals an older, weathered unit with visible wear, while the bottom half displays a sleek, modern replacement with clean lines and a fresh appearance.
The image showcases multiple air conditioning units mounted on a sleek gray wall, emphasizing their modern design and functional appeal in a commercial setting.
The image showcases a series of metallic HVAC units with sleek ducts and vents, positioned against a cloudy sky, emphasizing modern air management systems.
The image features a modern air duct system with angular metallic ductwork and a square air vent, all in a sleek, minimalistic design against a light-colored ceiling.
A sleek HVAC unit is displayed prominently against a backdrop of green grass and white siding, showcasing its modern design and condition.
The photo showcases a modern HVAC system installed in a wooden interior, featuring an organized set of pipes and valves prominently displayed behind glass, alongside a cozy chair and a potted plant.

Two technicians in blue uniforms are gathered near an outdoor air conditioning unit, discussing details while one holds a tablet. The setting includes a lush green backdrop, indicating a residential area.
Three technicians in safety gear are installing an air conditioning unit outside a building, showcasing teamwork and attention to detail in a professional setting.
A technician in a blue uniform is performing maintenance on a wall-mounted air conditioning unit, adjusting its inner panel. The setting features a clean, neutral wall background.
A technician in a blue uniform and hard hat works on an air conditioning unit mounted on a wall, using a drill and focused on the installation process.
